<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar\Bridge\SwiftMailer; use DebugBar\DataCollector\MessagesCollector; use Swift_Mailer; use Swift_Plugins_Logger; use Swift_Plugins_LoggerPlugin; /** * Collects log messages * * http://swiftmailer.org/ */ class SwiftLogCollector extends MessagesCollector implements Swift_Plugins_Logger { public function __construct(Swift_Mailer $mailer) { $mailer->registerPlugin(new Swift_Plugins_LoggerPlugin($this)); } public function add($entry) { $this->addMessage($entry); } public function dump() { $dump = ''; foreach ($this->messages as $message) { if (!$message['is_string']) { continue; } $dump .= $message['message'] . PHP_EOL; } return $dump; } public function getName() { return 'swiftmailer_logs'; } }
